documents.title: Evolving report vision: agent cognition as manipulable artifact
documents.outcome: Vision sketch from 2026-05-19 brainstorm: chat is no longer the medium — the medium is an evolving, renderable, addressable, typed artifact that the worker maintains and the human steers. See vision.html for the architecture, convergence map, and 1→5 trajectory.
documents.body: The body holds spec only — the report (current state, findings, open questions) lives in report.html , which vellum auto-prepends when rendering this fiber. Open it standalone if you want it without the surrounding spec. Desired State A way of working where: The worker produces an evolving rich document (markdown body for spec + report, with embedded media and HTML companions for richness) — not a transcript of decisions, not a final spec. The human reads and steers the artifact directly (annotations, typed amendments, multiverse promotions) — not a chat session. Chat is anchored, plural, contextual — it attaches to specific parts of the artifact when prose-of-thought is needed, but it’s not the front door. The reasoning is interpretable by construction — typed decisions + options + evidence + branches make the cognition reviewable without post-hoc weight-introspection. This is a direction , not a checkpoint. The trajectory in vision.html (steps 1 → 5) is the path forward; step 1 is done, step 2 is the next pressure point. Context Three threads in the air tonight prompted the synthesis: A long brainstorm between Cail and Claude (this interactive Shuttle dispatch) about the gap between Shuttle and Vellum — Shuttle is dispatch and lifecycle; Vellum is read and annotation; what sits between is the return channel by which annotations on the worker’s output feed the next dispatch. Thariq’s tweet (and longer post) on HTML-over-markdown as the agent’s output format, with the running implementation-notes.html companion as a specific pattern. A Slack exchange in #lightcone-research with François pitching ASTRA-style reasoning tracking as general explainable-AI infrastructure, and Kangning suggesting it merge with multiverse. The synthesis emerged because all four threads were pointing at parts of the same architecture, and the parts fit together. See vision.html for the full picture.

The human reads and steers the artifact directly (annotations, typed amendments, multiverse promotions) — not a chat session. Chat is anchored, plural, contextual — it attaches to specific parts of the artifact when prose-of-thought is needed, but it’s not the front door. The reasoning is interpretable by construction — typed decisions + options + evidence + branches make the cognition reviewable without post-hoc weight-introspection. This is a direction , not a checkpoint. The trajectory in vision.html (steps 1 → 5) is the path forward; step 1 is done, step 2 is the next pressure point.
